title: Giant P Alphabet Balloon Letters, Gold Self Inflating Custom Letter Balloons Birthday Decor, 40 Inch Helium Mylar Foil Name Word Balloons for Girls Men Anniversary Party Graduation Decoration Supplies
features: 🎈 What You Get: Our product package includes 1pcs 40 inch "P" letter foil balloon and 1pcs convenient straw for inflate. You can choose any big letter balloons to combine and customize the word you want to form. Make your party more unique and meaningful.

🎈 High Quality Material: Our gold alphabet balloons are made from grade mylar material, safe, non-Toxic, high quality, durability, long-lasting, self-inflating and reusable. It can be filled with air or helium, and 90% filling is enough to hold it for a long time. After the inflation is completed, just pinch the inflation port to complete the inflation.

🎈 Easy Use: Large letter balloons have holes on the top to string together to hang in the wall. Can be deflated with a straw to facilitate repeated balloon use. The giant balloons can be easily combined with other alphabet balloons to form words or names, adding a unique touch to your celebrations, ideal for birthday party.

🎈 Widely Application: The alphabet balloons are use for birthday party, wedding, baby shower, outdoor, home, celebrations, cheers, bridal shower, anniversary, graduation, class and school activities, senior picture day, amazing photo prop and other decoration. Whether used as party decorations or as a gift, the gold custom letter balloons creates an unforgettable atmosphere and visual impact.

🎈 Risk Free Purchase: We hope that every customer can have a satisfying and unforgettable party, customer satisfaction is our aim.If you have questions about our helium balloons, please feel free to contact us. We will reply to you within 24 hours.
description: Just like every princess needs an eye-catching princess dress, every party also needs its own unique features. Our custom letter balloons can make your party unique and stand out from the crowd. Specifications: 🎁 Size: 40 Inch 🎁 Package Include: 1pcs "P" Letter Balloons & 1pcs Straw 🎁 Color: Gold 🎁 Material: Foil 🎁 Great for: birthday party / wedding / baby / shower / outdoor / indoor / home / celebrations / cheers / bridal shower / anniversary / graduation / class and school activities / senior picture day / amazing photo prop and other decoration. How to Inflate the Mylar Balloons: 💖 Find out the inflatable mouth in the middle of the transparent sheet. 💖 Insert a straw or a gas pump into the inflatable mouth. 💖 Inflate the balloon slowly and gently till 90% full. 💖 Pinch its mouth tightly for a while, waiting for self-sealing. Listed below are some monogrammed words or phrases for your reference when purchasing a big letter balloons combination I Love You / Happy Birthday / Happy New Year / OH Baby / Anniversary Tip: If there are 2 layers of aluminum foil alphabet balloon sticky situation, must stop inflating, separate the 2 layer of balloons and then inflated, or easy to damage.
